jobs.name: Daily Morning Check
jobs.message: Good morning! Run a quick health check: check disk space with 'df -h /', check if the cron runner is running with 'ps aux | grep cron-runner | grep -v grep'. Post a brief morning status to Discord. Keep it short — 3-5 bullet points max.

jobs.name: Weekly Summary
jobs.message: It's Friday! Write a brief weekly summary. Read memory/active-threads.md and today's daily note if they exist. Summarize what was accomplished this week and what's still in progress. Post to Discord. Keep it conversational, not corporate.
